Expect your feed to look more and more like this in the coming weeks and months. https://t.co/kcnHnnCVya
Had an interesting exchange with roon of OpenAI last night over whether super intelligent AI would actually be able to navigate organizational challenges. https://t.co/2i9wYO24s1

Most AI apps are still burning money by sending every prompt to the most expensive model.

That won’t last.

The real unlock is routing: cheap models for simple jobs, stronger models when it actually matters, fallback when providers break.

This is the infra layer everyone

Make image models artistic again ✨

I've been playing with Krea 2 over the last week - and I'm blown away by the aesthetics.

My favorite feature may be moodboards, which guide your generations in more unique styles.

How they work + my tips 👇 https://t.co/oq0IrEBBAR

It's insanely fun to scroll a feed of images and use them to make different moodboards.

I have 10 - and each generates images in a unique style. You can turn up or down the strength while generating.

You can also upload your own images to train a moodboard on your style 👀 https://t.co/uNF7RyvETk

We can generate beautiful things 

(made with @krea_ai K2 🫶) https://t.co/Dzux2qGUqs
